name: Ember Crown
origin: Forged inside the first volcanic storm where skyfire met obsidian prayer.
power: Amplifies command over infernal plasma and living flame sigils.
consequence: Each activation awakens buried war memories from the vault walls.

name: Abyssal Prism
origin: Recovered from a drowned temple beneath a moonless tidal rift.
power: Bends shadows into solid pathways and mirror phantoms.
consequence: Reality fractures briefly, revealing parallel echoes of the wielder.

name: Solaris Gauntlet
origin: Cast by an extinct order that harvested dawn from meteor iron.
power: Converts radiant energy into precision kinetic bursts.
consequence: Nearby relics overload and imprint prophetic symbols in the air.
